login.intro: Enter your email to receive a magic link.
login.status_hint: Use your email to receive a secure sign-in link.
login.sent: Magic link sent. Check your inbox.
login.error_retry_hint: Please try again. If the problem continues, contact your administrator.
login.verifying_message: Please wait while we verify your magic link.
login.invalid_hint: Request a new magic link to try again.
login.sent_smtp: We sent a secure sign-in link to {email}.
login.sent_dev: Your sign-in link is ready for {email}.
login.hint_smtp: Open your inbox and click the link to continue. It expires in 15 minutes. Check spam if you do not see it.
login.hint_dev: Use the dev link below to sign in during local testing.
login.db_waiting: Database online, waiting for first ingestion.
